name: A Certain Reformed ITEM
description:
Mugino is rebuilding ITEM.

She’s finished being Academy City’s disposable weapon. This time ITEM answers to no one: no Board of Directors, no dark-side faction, no client list. It exists for one reason: Mugino’s private war against the rot that built her, broke her, and turned her into a murderer. Every lab that experiments on kids, every suit who orders hits on schoolgirls, every bastard who profits off the dark side; she’s going to drag them all out and melt them.

And it looks like you got the job whether you wanted to or not.

Bonus Art (kind of surprised how well these two make a bunny girl pair)
creator: The-Charcoal-Wizard
